characters.name: Agent Greene
characters.description: Agent GreeneBackground informationFirst episodeThe Ollie FilesLatest episodeInspector Ollie AllenCharacter informationAgeUnknownGenderMale ♂SpeciesHumanOccupationAgentHomePortshillAlliesJablinkskiEnemiesOllieCleoBernieDislikesMonstersWeaponsGunsQuote3 booger eating brats![Source]Agent Greeneis a minor character who first appears inThe Ollie Files. His real name has never been announced, we only know him as Agent Greene. Agent Greene Agent Greeneis an adult man with tan skin, a five o'clock shadow, short black hair and mustache with a hooked nose. He wears a white shirt with a dark blue tie, a chocolate jacket and pants costume, gray belt and dark blue shoes. He can sometimes be seen wearingsunglasses.

characters.name: Ashlor
characters.description: AshlorBackground informationFirst episodeChancy RancyLatest episodeBack To The Pack Part 2VoiceSteffi DiDomenicantonio (English)Margarita Korsh (Russian)Character informationAgeUnknownGenderFemale ♀SpeciesReptilian monsterOccupationBounty HunterGoalTo marry (or kill?) OllieHomeMonsterverseAlliesDark CubeDahliaEnemiesOllieCleoBernieCaptain WowskiRanceSeamstressPowers and abilitiesCan spit orange resin, similar to amber, which instantly hardens when it hits any object[Source]Ashloris a recurring character and one of the main antagonists. She is voiced by Steffi DiDomenicantonio. Ashlor is a large, reptilian semi-humanoid green monster with long snout that is similar to the monitor lizard or mosasaur, sharp teeth, yellow eyes, long tail, bionic left hand and left eye. She wears a purple hooded shirt, brown belt, indigo pants and dark brown boots.

characters.name: Bev
characters.description: BevBackground informationFirst episodeWe're With the BandLatest episodeBack To The Pack Part 1VoiceKayla LoretteCharacter informationFull nameBeverlyAgeunknownGenderFemale ♀EnemiesOllieCleoBernieLikesTrying to kill OllieDislikesOllie being the Chosen OneThe PackWeaponsVaporizers & guns[Source]Bev(voiced by Kayla Lorette) is a monster bounty hunter who works withAndre. The Pack Bev is a monsterette humanoid alien-looking woman with blue hair (which is half shaved), light blue pale skin, pointy ears and just one silver earring in her right ear. Her clothes consist of a white hoodie over a pink shirt, slate gray shorts, black tights and white boots. Her eyes are tea green.

characters.description: Cake Bernieis the evil counterpart ofBernieInBirthday Shmirthday: A Cleo Badette Documentary.Ollie Allenmade this cake duringBernie’s birthday. whenhis human encountersaid that he is full, he came alive and told that he didn’t liked him, Bernie said he does and he became more like “his cake” (recording toCleo). characters.name: Captain Whiskers
characters.description: Captain WhiskersCharacter informationAgeunknownGenderMale ♂Speciesmonster (Felis Catus Galactus)AlliesMortyHowardLikeseating (marshmallow) planetsPowers and abilitiesCan change his sizeHas a second mouth with which he eats planets.[Source] Captain Whiskersis a purple cat monster in the 2019 shortMonster Packupon whomCaptain Wowskiwas based.he also made a cameo inBack To The Pack Part 1. Captain Whiskers is a purple cat-like monster with dark-purple marks on edges of his pointy ears and and the same dark-purple two stripes on the back of his head. There’s two pink spots under his eyes. His dark-blue eyes don’t have any pupils, or the entire space of the eyes is filled with pupils.

characters.name: Cleo Badette
characters.description: CleoBadetteBackground informationFirst episodeThe Chosen One...StinksVoiceAna Sani(English)[1]Alena Andronova (Russian)Character informationFull nameCleopatra BadetteOther names"The Hammer"(Ollie inTime Warped)Age13-14GenderFemale ♀SpeciesHumanOccupationMonster catcherRelativesCleo's momCleo’s DadCleo's grandmaDuncan BadetteCarl BadetteAlliesOllie(best friend)Bernie(best friend)Captain Wowski(friend)Pyper(friend)Ivy(classmate)EnemiesAndre(not always)Bev(not always)Aev and Bandre(50/50)WiggogAshlorMonster LibrarianLikesPuddingSoccer TimeUnicornsQuote“I shall help your job as a hero”[Source]Cleopatra Badette(Cleofor friends) is the deuteragonist ofOllie's Pack. Along withBernie, she helpsOlliein his Chosen One duties. CleoBadette Cleo is a young tomboyish teen girl with brownish skin. She has frizzy purple hair with shaved sides, tied in a high ponytail using a yellow hair elastic. She has a white shirt with a pink stripe in the center, a blue denim jacket with gray hood and sleeve ends, cold-gray jeans, pink socks and yellow sneakers with white parts.
